pinyin: Zhè piàn húpō de shuǐ hěn qīngchè.
english: The water in this lake is very clear.

sent_simp: 她决定三十岁以后再考虑生育。
sent_trad: 她決定三十歲以後再考慮生育。
pinyin: Tā juédìng sānshí suì yǐhòu zài kǎolǜ shēngyù.
english: She decided to think about having children after turning thirty.

sent_simp: 他把最后一块蛋糕留给妹妹。
sent_trad: 他把最後一塊蛋糕留給妹妹。
pinyin: Tā bǎ zuìhòu yī kuài dàngāo liú gěi mèimei.
english: He set aside the last piece of cake for his younger sister.

pinyin: Fǎyuàn pàn tā jiānjìn liǎng nián.
english: The court sentenced him to two years in prison.

sent_simp: 他对朋友总是真诚相待。
sent_trad: 他對朋友總是真誠相待。
pinyin: Tā duì péngyou zǒng shì zhēnchéng xiāngdài.
english: He always treats his friends with sincerity.

sent_simp: 他花了一天写这个程式。
sent_trad: 他花了一天寫這個程式。
pinyin: Tā huā le yī tiān xiě zhège chéngshì.
english: He spent a whole day writing this program.

sent_simp: 古代统治者靠税收维持国家运转。
sent_trad: 古代統治者靠稅收維持國家運轉。
pinyin: Gǔdài tǒngzhìzhě kào shuìshōu wéichí guójiā yùnzhuǎn.
english: Ancient rulers relied on tax revenue to keep the state running.

sent_simp: 这篇文章聚焦于年轻人的就业问题。
sent_trad: 這篇文章聚焦於年輕人的就業問題。
pinyin: Zhè piān wénzhāng jùjiāo yú niánqīngrén de jiùyè wèntí.
english: This article focuses on the employment issues facing young people.
